nasb.text: You have turned for me my mourning into dancing; You have loosed my sackcloth and girded me with gladness,

esv.text: You have turned for me my mourning into dancing; you have loosed my sackcloth and clothed me with gladness,

cnv.text: 你已經把我的悲哀變為舞蹈， 把我的麻衣脫去，又給我穿上歡樂；

ccb.text: 你把我的哀哭变成了舞步， 为我脱下悲伤的麻衣， 披上喜乐的外袍，

csbs.text: 你已将我的哀哭变为跳舞， 你已脱去我的麻衣，为我披上喜乐，
